item.name: Nezha Chariot Dizi
item.description: It is not known why that when sounding this lacquered wooden fife an elaborate two-wheeled chariot appears, only that one does.

mount.name: Nezha Chariot
mount.action: Summon forth your Nezha chariot and travel the skies like a god.
mount.description: Yanxian legend tells of a chariot that would carry gods and heroes across the heavens that they might keep watch over their earthbound children. Surprisingly, the realm's flora and fauna are unscathed by the fire and wind belched forth by the divine carriage.
mount.tooltip:
You look to me like
a womanman in need of a nice,
relaxin' carriage ride!
- Bremondt
